# Estimated Delivery Date

**Most orders placed before 1:00 PM PST ship the same business day.** Estimated delivery dates are
based on product availability, order time, and destination.

Delivery times may take longer if they include:

- Large quantities of an item

- Items that can only ship via freight truck

- Items that ship directly from the manufacturer

- Shipments to remote locations

- Orders placed during holiday promotion periods

**Note:** Estimated shipping times apply to addresses within the contiguous United States. Delivery
dates are not guaranteed.

## Product Details

### Features:

- This wash mitt for cars offers main features - safety, softness, and comfort - add extended durability due to the innovative type of fibers. Q2M Smoothie EVO is the perfect high-quality wash mitt for both professionals and detailing enthusiasts alike.

- Q2M Smoothie EVO glides over the surface collecting dirt particles in the safest possible way. The washing process feels more "lubricated" and smooth. The mitt is equipped with an ergonomic welt protecting it from slipping or falling. It is made of genuine Korean material and custom sewn by Gyeon.

Q²M Smoothie EVO is an improved version of our legendary synthetic wash mitt. It now features a selection of 3 different types of fibers and has a GSM of 1250. An edgeless finish, a practical welt, and functional sewing inside make it an ergonomic tool suitable for every vehicle. Q²M Smoothie EVO glides over the surface collecting dirt particles in the safest possible way. The washing process feels more “lubricated” and smooth than ever. With the added twist loop fibers, the cleaning power has increased compared to the previous version.

**INNOVATIVE FIBERS**
This wash mitt for cars offers main features - safety, softness, and comfort - add extended durability due to the innovative type of fibers. Q²M Smoothie EVO is the perfect high-quality wash mitt for both professionals and detailing enthusiasts alike.

**A SMOOTH SAFE WASH**
Q²M Smoothie EVO glides over the surface collecting dirt particles in the safest possible way. The washing process feels more “lubricated” and smooth. The mitt is equipped with an ergonomic welt protecting it from slipping or falling. It is made of genuine Korean material and custom sewn by Gyeon.

**PRO TIP**
Make sure to use your Q²M Smoothie EVO in the two bucket wash method to ensure you do not induce swirl marks in your paint.

Hand wash only. Do not tumble dry. Do not iron. Do not bleach.
